summary.lv: Senior AI Full-Stack inženiera amats IT Camp fintech partneruzņēmumā, veidojot AI risinājumus no sākuma līdz galam (AI konveijeri, RAG/aģentu plūsmas) ar Node.js backend un AWS serverless infrastruktūru.
summary.en: A Senior AI Full-Stack Engineer role at an IT Camp fintech partner building AI solutions end-to-end (AI pipelines, RAG/agent workflows) with a Node.js backend and AWS serverless infrastructure.
